title: Publish v1.0 + Definition of Shipped handoff
context: v1.0 ships only when all Definition of Shipped criteria are met (PLAN section 8) and the work is handed to a named steward/partner with a documented runbook (PLAN M3). Depends on 017-019. Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Publish the v1.0 catalog and a Definition of Shipped handoff naming a steward/partner and documenting the upkeep runbook.
acceptanceCriteria: All Definition of Shipped criteria met (PLAN section 8); steward/partner named; runbook documented.
v1.0 release tagged under CC BY 4.0 with outcomes-tracking ledger live (O5/O6).
output: output/ v1.0 release + DEFINITION-OF-SHIPPED handoff doc (steward/partner named, runbook + outcomes ledger).
